app.name: Fast Vite Electron Template
app.one_liner: A high-speed Vite + Electron template optimized for rapid development using esbuild, tsup, and custom tooling like Doubleshot and einf.

screens.name: Main Application Window
screens.purpose: Host the primary Vue-based UI for the Electron application.
primary_actions: Communicate with backend services via decorator-based IPC
Initialize Electron main process via Doubleshot
Render Vue frontend with Vite HMR

rust_commands.name: build_electron_app
rust_commands.purpose: Build the Electron application using tsup and electron-builder integrated via @doubleshot/builder.

rust_commands.name: start_dev_server
rust_commands.purpose: Start the development server with Vite and Doubleshot-powered Electron main process.

mvp_plan: week 1: Configure Doubleshot plugin for main process development
week 1: Implement basic TypeScript decorator-based IPC controller
week 1: Set up Vite + Electron project structure using fast-vite-electron template
acceptance_tests: IPC communication between renderer and main process works via TypeScript decorators.
The application builds successfully using tsup and electron-builder without Webpack.
